title: Overclock Your Reps: What Caffeine Actually Does for Exercise
description: That pre-workout jolt is real science, not just a placebo. Here's how caffeine boosts power output, delays fatigue, and when to time your dose for max effect. Read the evidence-based breakdown -> #caffeine #preworkout #exerciseperformance #sportsnutrition #fitnessscience #energyboost
